research_contract.question: Does fail-closed same-cursor retry preserve completed-M1 EUR/USD observability after a transient source failure?
research_contract.measurement_repair: On completed-M1 source failure, seal one content-addressed error, cancel strategy-owned stale pending orders, admit no new entry, retain the cursor, and retry the same suffix.
unchanged_controls: completed OANDA M1 bid/ask decisions and executable poll-quote fills
research_contract.falsifier: Any source failure without a valid error receipt, any new order while source-blocked, any cursor advance across missing evidence, any stale strategy order left active, or any duplicate cutoff/decision invalidates the repair.
known_counterevidence: The sealed v2 rooms ended after two completed-M1 decisions, but their detached stderr was not durably captured, so the exact exception class is unknown.
This retry wave measures source-failure containment and entry observability only; it cannot establish positive expectancy.
The original D and sealed F waves remain immutable and are not restarted.
